chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1093 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4287/24 3.For hearing of main case 21-05-2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Balouch, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that the petitioner will fill a fresh petition after curing defects in the present petition. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
